Uses of Interface
com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.gyroscope.KnownFrameGyroscopeCalibrator

  • Packages that use KnownFrameGyroscopeCalibrator 
    Package Description
    com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.gyroscope
    Contains classes for gyroscope calibration.

    • Uses of KnownFrameGyroscopeCalibrator in com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.gyroscope

      Classes in com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.gyroscope with type parameters of type KnownFrameGyroscopeCalibrator 
      Modifier and Type Interface Description
      interface  KnownFrameGyroscopeCalibratorListener<T extends KnownFrameGyroscopeCalibrator<?,​?>>
      Contains listener for gyroscope calibrators when frame (position, velocity and orientation) is known for all measurements.
      Classes in com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.gyroscope that implement KnownFrameGyroscopeCalibrator 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  KnownFrameGyroscopeLinearLeastSquaresCalibrator
      Estimates gyroscope biases, cross couplings and scaling factors along with G-dependent cross biases introduced on the gyroscope by the specific forces sensed by the accelerometer.
      class  KnownFrameGyroscopeNonLinearLeastSquaresCalibrator
      Estimates gyroscope biases, cross couplings and scaling factors along with G-dependent cross biases introduced on the gyroscope by the specific forces sensed by the accelerometer.
